title: Nebula Room
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Nebula Room''' was an expensive restaurant onboard the luxury liner ''[[Star of Empire]]''.

[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Dol Donar II]] with his wife [[Rissa Donar|Rissa]] and their son, freshly commissioned officer [[Nathan Donar III|Nathan]], dined there, following his graduation from the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]]. His classman [[Kyle Katarn]] was also invited. They had green salad, fresh [[scone]], [[Runyip/Legends|runyip]] stew, leaves with some berries; and [[candied insects]], a specialty of the chef, who brought the bowl to the table himself.

Hearing that the young officer's [[Morgan Katarn|father]] was allegedly murdered by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], the Governor started shouting curses to them, making some customers to turn to stare, and his wife feel uncomfortable, worried that some of them might be Rebels or sympathizers. The night ended with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] inviting the governor for a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
